name: Ellucian Ethos Integration API
description: Ellucian Ethos Integration is a cloud-based integration platform for higher education institutions. It provides a standardized RESTful API following the Ellucian Education Data Model (EEDM), enabling interoperability across student information systems (Banner, Colleague, PowerCampus), HR, finance, financial aid, and other campus applications. The API exposes 316+ EEDM-versioned resources covering the full spectrum of institutional data including persons, students, courses, sections, registrations, grades, academic programs, financial aid, employees, positions, and facilities. Authentication uses an API key exchanged for a JWT bearer token. Resource versioning is controlled via the Accept header using the application/vnd.hedtech.integration.v{version}+json media type.
